headline: Bank of America revamps Marvell stock price for 2026
summary: Bank of America made a bold call on Marvell Technology (MRVL) Friday morning, flipping its rating from neutral to buy and lifting its price target to $110 from $90. The move came hours after Marvell reported blowout fiscal fourth-quarter results that sent shares surging more than 16%. The upgrade ...

headline: Russell 2000: Are geopolitical risks priced in?
summary: Investing.com — Recent declines in the Russell 2000 suggest that some geopolitical risk may already be reflected in small-cap valuations, though additional downside could emerge if global tensions escalate, according to Bank of America Global Research.

headline: How The Franco-Nevada (TSX:FNV) Story Is Shifting With New Metal Price Assumptions
summary: Franco-Nevada’s updated modelling now points to a fair value estimate of CA$369.94, compared with the prior CA$368.44 figure. This puts a small but meaningful spotlight on price targets around the CA$280 level cited in recent research. Analysts are linking these target moves to refreshed 2026 metal price assumptions, quicker rounds of target revisions, and an active debate between bullish and cautious voices. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you...

headline: How The Callaway Golf (CALY) Story Is Shifting With New Targets Products And Buybacks
summary: The fair value estimate for Callaway Golf has shifted from US$16.05 to US$16.35, putting the modeled price target in the mid teens and closer to where much of the recent Street work has been clustering. That move is in line with analysts who view current levels as broadly consistent with their updated perspectives on the golf consumer and Callaway Golf’s ability to address questions around market share and profitability. Read on to see how you can track these changing targets and the evolving...
